# Acme Corp

Industrial supplier headquartered in Cleveland; manufactures fastening systems for automotive and aerospace customers. Strategic tier since 2023. The relationship is anchored on the data platform — Pacific does not currently advise on strategy or operations.

See [contracts](/clients/acme-corp/contracts) for the active SOW.
